titleStmt.title: SII 38.146: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 146. (A.R. No. 146 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a nineth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the usual meykīrtti of the ruler, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara.

It records an arrangement made by the adhikāri, Rājēndrasiṅga Mūvēndavēḷār who had stationed himself in the Vakkāṇikkum-maṇḍapa infront of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, to examine and enquire into the affairs of the above temple. The fines being collected by the śrīkāriyam and such authorities from the ūrgaḷilār of the ūrs under the dēvadāna of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyār temple as also from the nivandakārar incharge of the several services in the temple.

The officials ordered the institution of several services and rituals in the temple out of the fines thus collected. It was enjoined that the śrīkāriyam official, Kōḍi Chandrasēkharaṉ Alantūr in Āvūr-kūṟṟam (a sub-division of) Nittāvinōda-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam was ordered to carry out these charities. Also records that during the same period an individual, Veṇkāḍan Āḍavallān of Nāraṇamaṅgalam in Rājarājapāṇḍināḍu donated ninety sheep to burn a perpetual lamp to the god Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiya Mahādēva. The shepherds of the locality Tribhuvananātha-chēri received the sheep and agreed to measure out ninety nāḻi of oil annually at the rate of an uḻakku of oil deity at the temple premises.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irumaṭaṉ m
cirtaṉic celviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭutuyilūḻiyuḷ Iṭaitu
ṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉaveliy paṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkai
yum naṇṇaṟa karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum poru kaṭaliḻattaraicar muṭiyu mi
ṟeviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyumi
n=tiraṉāramum tenn=ticaiyiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimai
yiṟ cuṭuṅkulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatir velai
t tol peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivum ceruvil ciṉavilirupattoru kālaraicukaḷai ka
ṭṭa paracurāmaṉ meviruñ cān=timattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟirut taku muṭiyum pa
yaṅkoṭu paḻi mikamuyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum
piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭieḻaraiyilakkamum navanitikkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarako
ṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷanāmaṇaik koṇamum veñci
ṉa virapañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil
vaṇmurttiyātiRead vaṇkirttinakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ ṟol kulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyo
ṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikula taṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟi miḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiya
mum pūcurar cera nalk kocalai nāṭun tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyu
miraṇaicūraṉai muraṇukka tākkit tikkaṉai kirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacan=tan māviḻin=toṭat taṅkā(ka)ta cāral
vaṅkāḷa tecamu toṭu kaṭaṟ caṅka voṭṭal mahimālaṉaiRead mahipālaṉaiveñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉai
yum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilar neṭuṅkaṭaluttira lāṭamum vairiRead veṟimalarmalart tirttat teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyu
m Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅ kirāmavijeyottuṅka panmanākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam
porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭumakappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamu mārttava nakan (nakar)
porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum mottoḷi puṉamaṇip putavamuṅ kaṉamaṇikkatavum niṟai ji
vijaiyamuntuṟai nirppuṉṉaiyum maṉmalaiyūṟaiyiṟ coṉmalaiyurumāḻ kaṭalacūḻ māyiriṭiṅkamuṅ kala
ṅkāvalviṉai yilaṅkā topamuṅRead yilaṅkā cokamuṅkāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum vi
ḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟu n=talaittakkor kalaittakkolamuṅ titamarvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmu
tirk kaṭun=tiralilāmuritecamu teṉakka vārpoḻil māṉakkavāramu n=toṭukaṭaṟ kāvalkaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporu
taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakesarivarmmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu
Atikārikaḷ śrīrājendraciṅkamuven=taveḷār jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻal
nāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkoyilil muṉpil vakkāṇikkum maṇṭapattu koyiṟ karumamārāyā viruntu tiruvoṟṟiyū
ṭaiyār tevatāṉavūrkaḷilāraiyum palapaṇi nivantakkāṟaraiyum śrī kāriyañceyvāruḷḷiṭṭār palaruṅ kuṟṟattaṇṭa
ṅ koḷvaṉavum Ittevar paṇṭārattu mutalāka Aḷantu varum nellukkuk kālaḷavurai varicikkalattu vāy muṉnāḻi
yuriyākak koṇṭu varum nellum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum mutalākak koṇṭu Ivaiyiṟṟukkuc cilavākat tiruvo
ṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku Aṇukkakaṟpūrat tirunon=tā viḷakku nālviralu caraṅkoḻuntu viṭṭeriya rājendracoḻanum tattaval
li m Eṉum tirunāmattāl ceyvittu vaitta pittaḷai nilai viḷakkiraṇṭiṉ meṟ ceppu kal vaittom nāḷo
ṉṟinukku tiruvoṟṟiyūraṉ nāḻiyāl naṟuney yiru nāḻiyāka Orāṇṭinukku neyyeḻu nūṟṟirupati nāḻikku poṉ ka
ḻañcinukku tiruvoṟṟiyūraṉ nāḻiyāl neyyayaimpati nāḻiyākap poṉ patināṟ kaḻañceyeṭṭu mañcāṭiyum nāḷ
Oṉṟinukku kaṟpūraṅkuṭi naṟ kallāliraṇṭu mañcāṭiyāka Āṇṭu varai kaṟpūram muppattaṟu kaḻañcinukkum poṉ
kaḻañcinukkuk kaṟpūramaṟu kaḻañcākap poṉṉaṟu kaḻañcum Uṭaiyārkku nittamuñ cārtti yaruḷa niloṟpalat tiruppa
ḷḷittāmamuñ ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmamum Akkiyiṭuvāriruvarkku nāḷoṉṟinukku nellupatakku nāṉāḻi
yāka Orāṇṭinukku nellu Eḻupattaiṅkalamum Ivarkaḷukkup puṭavai mutal Āṇṭuvarai perāl poṉ kaḻañca
raiyākap poṉmukkaḻañcum Uṭaiyārkku stottiramum Adhyānamum viṇṇappañceyyum brāhmaṇar nāl
varkku nāḷoṉṟinukkup perāl nellukkuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka Āṇṭinukku nellu nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalamum I
varkaḷukkup puṭavai mutalāṇṭu varai perāl poṉ kaḻañcaraiyāka poṉ Aṟukaḻañcuṅ kārāṇaiviṭaṅkatevar na
mpirāṭṭiyārkku Addhacāma Amutu cetaruḷa nāḷoṉṟinukkup patteṭṭuk kuttal paḻavarici yiru nāḻiyāka Orāṇṭinu
kkup paḻavarici Eḻukalane tūṇippatakkiṉukku Aiñciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl poṉakap paḻanellu patiṉeṇka
lane Irutūṇik kuṟuṇiyum nāḷoṉṟinukku neyyamutoru ceviṭāka Orāṇṭinukku neyyamutoṉpatu nāḻikkum
pon muṉṟu mañcāṭiyumaiñcu māvum nāḷoṉṟinukku caṟkaraiyamutoru ceviṭāka Āṇṭuvarai caṟkaraiyamu
toṉpati nāḻikkum poṉ niraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum nāḷoṉṟinukkup paruppamutāḻaākkum pala kaṟiyamutu niṟai E
ṇ palamum tayiramuturikkum nāḷonṟinukku nelliru nāḻiyāka Āṇṭuvarai nelloṉ patiṉkalanetūṇi
nāṉāḻiyum nāḷoṉṟinukkuk kaṟiyamutu miḷaku Arai ceviṭāka Āṇṭuvarai miḷaku nāṉāḻiyuriyākap poṉ
mañcāṭiyu meḻumāḻum nāḷoṉṟinukku Aṭaikkāyamutiraṇṭāka Āṇṭuvarai yaṭaikkāyamu toṇṇūṟṟiru
patinukkup poṉ mañcāṭiyuṅkuṉṟiyum nāḷoṉṟinukku veṟṟilaiyamuteṭṭāka Āṇṭu varai veṟṟilaip pa
ṟṟu muppattāṟinukku nellut tūṇināṉāḻiyum Āka Ippaṭiyey nivan=tamākki taṉ nevaliṭṭu pottaka
tteḻutik kalluveṭṭuvittu Iṉnivan=taṅkaḷ muṭṭāmey śrī kāriyañcevārum maṭamuṭai yāru n=te
varkaṉmikaḷuṅ karaṇattārkaḷume celuttakaveṉṟevaliṭṭa paṭiye Ipparicu cevikkaveṉṟu Eva I
nivataṅkaḷ cevitta pari cevittār Ittevarkku śrīkāriyañ cekiṉṟa coḻamaṇṭalattu te
ṉ karai nittaviṉota vaḷanāṭṭu Āvūrk kūṟṟattu Ālanturuṭaiyāṉ koṭican=tiracekaraṉ .
Ittevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya mahātevarkku candrādittavaṟ nittam Oru tiruno
n=tā viḷakkerippataṟku rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu nāraṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ veṇkāṭanāṭa vallān vaitta
cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇṭu kaṭavom tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tiruviḷa
k kāṭṭukkuṭikaḷ tiripuvaṉanātacceri maṉṟāṭikaḷukkuc camain=ta murtti Aiyyanaṭiyum tirumālpuṉṉaiyum naṉ
taṅkāṭanum kāṭanum māṟaṉ tāmotiraṉum viraṉ nakulaṉum Oṟṟi paṉniruvaṉum kaṭuṅkali Attiārur
ṉum nicakkaṉum cūra kuṟumpaṉum muḷḷiṭṭa maṉṟāṭikaḷom Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu tiruvoṟṟi
yū �ḻiyāl nicatam Uḻakku neyyāka Āṇṭuvarai toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi neyyum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum nilaippo
ṭāka tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār perumpaṇṭārattukkey koṇṭu ceṉṟaḷantu kuṭuppomāṉom muṟco
ripuvananātacceri maṉṟāṭikaḷom Itu panmaheśvararakṣai �
Digital edition of SII 38.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
